segments.speaker: 题目1
segments.text: What time does the registrar's office pen tomorrow?

segments.speaker: 题目2
segments.text: I don't know how many people will join us tonight for study group.

segments.speaker: 题目3
segments.text: Where can I find the class notes?

segments.speaker: 题目4
segments.text: Peter said he would look for supplies.

segments.speaker: 题目5
segments.text: Why are you going to the museum?

segments.speaker: 题目6
segments.text: Maybe the power went out for this whole area.

segments.speaker: 题目7
segments.text: Are you going to the conference on the evolution of modernist poetry?

segments.speaker: 题目8
segments.text: Are you free to join the discussion?

segments.speaker: 题目9
segments.text: Where is the nearest train station?

segments.speaker: 题目10
segments.text: Can you turn down the volume?

segments.speaker: 题目11
segments.text: Do you have any questions about the course requirements?

segments.speaker: 题目1
segments.text: Can you help me understand the instructions for this homework?

segments.speaker: 题目2
segments.text: Who forgot to turn off the lights?
